summary: Deterministic spec evidence covers fixture-backed eval surfaces, scenario normalizer completeness, stale evidence visibility, machine-readable review/report artifacts, and durable scenario proposal/history packets.

covered: A checked-in evaluation surfaces proof artifact records selected reopenable summary packet evidence for dev/repo, dev/skill, app/chat, and app/prompt presets.
Scenario normalizer completeness and schema tests cover surviving discover scenarios normalize helpers and proposal packet schemas.
Claim status and validation tests keep stale state visible in packets and rendered status reports.
Review/report HTML, review-feedback, and review-variant tests prove readable views render over machine-readable packets and route reviewers to durable artifacts.
Scenario history and proposal normalization tests preserve durable candidates, held-out selection, observable cadence, and inspectable proposal packets.
notClaimed: This bundle does not close the documented held-out end-to-end scenario-history evidence gap.
This bundle does not claim active-run review-learning aggregation is wired; it covers selected-packet summary behavior and durable packet rendering.

commandEvidence.command: npm run lint:scenario-normalizers && node scripts/agent-runtime/scenario-proposal-schemas.test.mjs && node scripts/starter-kit-parity.test.mjs && node scripts/agent-runtime/render-claim-status-report.test.mjs && node scripts/agent-runtime/run-review-variant.test.mjs && node scripts/agent-runtime/run-executor-variants.test.mjs
outputSummary: scenario normalization runtime completeness: 3 families pass 7-surface check
starter kit fixtures match canonical proposal fixtures byte-for-byte
claim status report renderer tests pass
review variant and executor variant wrapper tests pass

checkedInEvidence.proves: Selected summary packet evidence exists for every shipped evaluation preset without linking ignored self-dogfood outputs as direct spec evidence.
The surviving scenario normalization runtime surface is complete across the declared normalization families and surface checks.
Generated claim status reports surface validation, review, eval-plan, and refresh/stale state instead of masking it.
Evidence state transitions require verified evidence and propagate stale evidence through validation/status surfaces.
Readable report HTML is rendered from report packets, including scenario buckets, reason codes, warnings, and runtime context.
Readable review packet and review summary HTML render over machine-readable review artifacts and durable variant outputs.
Review feedback packets, review variant routing, and scenario proposal command flows produce durable machine-readable packets.
Scenario history preserves deterministic selection, held-out graduation, and stable baseline-cache keys.
Scenario proposal normalizers produce reproducible inspectable proposal candidates across chatbot, workflow, and skill shapes.

decision.reason: The checked-in artifact, targeted tests, and lint scripts cover the deterministic portions of the five spec claims while explicitly excluding their documented open end-to-end evidence gaps.
